age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Research Associate Position-1 (Postdoctoral Fellow) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Ropar Research Associate Position-1 (Postdoctoral Fellow) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Research Associate Position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Chemistry or Materials Science to be eligible for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q7. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate position will be as per DST norms.

faq.question: Q9. How should I apply for this position?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email. Prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.
